title: Be careful of Popo's new tactics 小心黑警新戰術

replies.msg:
佢地宜家知道集會同遊行現場,人太多係唔可以拉晒
所以佢地新策略係等你地返屋企果陣伏鳩你, 守係黨鐵同村口
831 同 901 好撚多人畀佢係D車站碼頭伏擊, 各位要諗新既對策

They knew that it's impossible to arrest all the people in protest because it's just too many of us.
So their new tactics is to gank you when you are going home, guarding the stations exits and estate entrance.
31 Aug and 1 Sep lots of our brave bros are being ambushed and arrested brutally at the stations and piers.
We need a new counter stratergy!

Lin done Jai plz comment binlingual. Dont be afraid of wrong grammar. Let other bros correct it for you
